palettes.winter_chic: Muted Slate Grey, Frost White, accents of 80s Yellow Gold. High-contrast cinematic shadows.
palettes.imperial_vienna: Deep Royal Blue, Polished Gold, Basalt Black. Soft amber volumetric lighting.
palettes.nordic_neon: Electric Cyan, Arctic White, Deep Navy. Stroboscopic neon highlights.
palettes.provence_mist: Lavender Grey, Weathered Stone, Soft Morning Light. Low-contrast atmospheric haze.
